gold.title: Text Shimmer
gold.reason: 6,094 downloads and 54 likes — highest engagement in the folder. Configurable shimmer sweep built with Framer Motion and CSS gradients. Universally applicable for hero headings, taglines, and CTAs.

gold.title: Text Generate Effect
gold.reason: 1,547 downloads and 30 likes. Word-by-word fade-in on load is a signature hero text pattern on modern SaaS sites. Production-quality Framer Motion implementation with high adoption.

gold.title: Vapour Text Effect
gold.reason: 1,544 downloads. Canvas-based text vaporization with particle cycling creates a dramatic hero impression — strong for tech startups, agencies, and creative portfolios.

gold.title: Hyper Text
gold.reason: 1,057 downloads and 16 likes. Hover-triggered character scramble is a signature interaction on premium tech landing pages. Well-implemented with AnimatePresence and configurable framer props.

gold.title: Typewriter Text
gold.reason: 987 downloads and 16 likes. Character-by-character typewriter reveal is a highly demanded, versatile hero and tagline component. Clean implementation with wide applicability.

gold.title: Textarea
gold.reason: 884 downloads. A polished, accessible textarea primitive that every SaaS product and contact-form page needs. High adoption confirms production readiness.

gold.title: Morphing Text
gold.reason: 690 downloads and 14 likes. Smooth word morphing animation is an eye-catching hero pattern on enterprise SaaS and agency sites. Strong design quality from the MagicUI ecosystem.

gold.title: Typing Animation
gold.reason: 667 downloads and 7 likes. Character-by-character typing with clean API. Widely applicable for hero taglines, product descriptions, and interactive demos.

gold.title: Gradual Spacing
gold.reason: 555 downloads and 5 likes. Animated letter-spacing reveal adds a premium feel to headings. Simple yet highly effective for hero sections and section titles on any business site.

gold.title: Shining Text
gold.reason: 492 downloads. Animated shine sweep over text is high-impact for CTAs, badges, and hero headings. Easy to integrate and broadly applicable across SaaS, e-commerce, and portfolio sites.

gold.title: Text Loop
gold.reason: 462 downloads and 5 likes. Smooth looping transitions between multiple text items is a standard hero pattern for rotating value propositions. Clean API and professional execution.

gold.title: Word Rotate
gold.reason: 411 downloads and 3 likes. Vertical word rotation for hero headlines is a staple on modern SaaS landing pages. Polished Framer Motion animation with minimal, reusable interface.

gold.title: Animated Shiny Text
gold.reason: 393 downloads and 3 likes. Shiny shimmer overlay is a modern design touch for hero highlights and badge labels. Well-adopted and broadly applicable.

gold.title: Word Pull Up
gold.reason: 393 downloads and 3 likes. Words pulling up into view word-by-word is a clean, elegant entrance animation for hero headings and section titles.

gold.title: Gradient Text
gold.reason: 2,872 downloads — third-highest in folder. Gradient-filled text is one of the most universally used design elements on modern websites. High adoption confirms production readiness.

gold.title: Animated Text Cycle
gold.reason: 2,262 downloads. Smoothly animated word cycling built with Framer Motion — perfect for hero sections. High adoption and easy integration into any website redesign.

gold.title: Digital Serenity - Animated Landing Page
gold.reason: 505 downloads. A complete dark-mode animated landing section with word-by-word text reveal, grid background, and ambient decorations — high-impact for tech SaaS and creative agency redesigns.

gold.title: Text Particle
gold.reason: 377 downloads. Particle-based text rendering creates a visually spectacular hero effect. Popular and applicable to agency, startup, and portfolio websites wanting a strong first impression.

gold.title: Liquid Text
gold.reason: 362 downloads. Liquid morphing text is a distinctive, high-quality visual for bold hero headings. Appeals broadly to creative and technology brands.

gold.title: Text Color
gold.reason: 326 downloads. Animated text color transitions are versatile and add polish to headings and labels on any website. High download count indicates strong real-world demand.

gold.title: Magic Text
gold.reason: 286 downloads. Scroll-triggered text reveal is a staple pattern on modern landing pages, widely used for section headings and pull quotes.

gold.title: Animated Text
gold.reason: 264 downloads and 2 likes. General-purpose animated text with clean entrance effects. Broad applicability and solid implementation make it a reliable hero and section-title component.

gold.title: Interactive Text Particle
gold.reason: 256 downloads. Canvas-based hover-reactive particle text is visually impressive and responsive. Strong hero section candidate for modern SaaS and creative websites.

gold.title: Blur In
gold.reason: 235 downloads. Blur-to-sharp text entrance animation is a clean, modern effect widely used for section reveals and hero titles. Easy to integrate and broadly applicable.

gold.title: Text Reveal Card
gold.reason: 247 downloads and 8 likes. Mousemove-triggered text reveal inside a card creates a premium interactive feel for feature highlights and portfolio cards.

gold.title: Gradient Heading
gold.reason: 160 downloads. Gradient-styled heading from a reputable UI library. Clean and directly applicable as a drop-in heading element for virtually any modern website redesign.

gold.title: Container Text Flip
gold.reason: 152 downloads. Inline text flip within a container — useful for hero sentences highlighting rotating keywords. Clean SaaS value-proposition section pattern.

gold.title: Text Rewind
gold.reason: 176 downloads and 9 likes — strong like-to-download ratio. Distinctive text rewind animation creates a memorable impression for hero sections and interactive marketing pages.

gold.title: Blurred Stagger Text
gold.reason: 86 downloads. Staggered blur-reveal per character is a polished, premium entrance effect for hero and section headings. Directly applicable to SaaS, portfolio, and agency sites.

gold.title: Animated Counter
gold.reason: 81 downloads. Animated number counter is a standard trust-building element on SaaS landing pages (e.g., '10,000+ customers'). Simple but highly applicable and production-ready.

gold.title: Word Fade In
gold.reason: 146 downloads. Word-by-word fade-in is a subtle, professional entrance effect for hero headings and body copy reveals. Clean implementation and high general applicability.

gold.title: Matrix Text
gold.reason: 299 downloads. Matrix-style character cascade is visually striking for tech and cybersecurity brands. High enough adoption and impressive enough visually to serve as a distinctive hero effect.

silver.title: Flip Text

silver.title: Fade Text

silver.title: Infinite Text Marquee
silver.reason: 112 downloads. Framer Motion infinite marquee useful for logo strips and social proof. Good quality but higher-adopted marquee alternatives exist in this folder.

silver.title: Word Counter

silver.reason: 41 downloads. Animated underline effect on text is a clean, subtle design detail for links and headings. Broadly applicable but supplementary in scope.

silver.title: Dynamic Text Slider
silver.reason: 60 downloads. Draggable range slider revealing text inside a hero headline is a creative, interactive concept. Novel but specialized to specific creative briefs.

silver.title: Text Animation
silver.reason: 60 downloads. General-purpose text animation component. Solid but generic — useful as a utility block without a standout design signature.

silver.title: Text Stagger Hover

silver.title: Shimmer Text

silver.reason: 51 downloads. Scramble/glitch text animation adds a techy personality to headings. Good for cybersecurity, AI, or developer-tools brands.

silver.title: Pointer Highlight

silver.title: Variable Font Hover By Random Letter
silver.reason: 46 downloads and 2 likes. Animated variable font weight per letter is a sophisticated typographic effect. Requires a variable font to work, limiting plug-and-play applicability.

silver.title: Text Marque
silver.reason: 132 downloads. Marquee text component useful for social proof and announcements. Decent adoption but less feature-rich than Gold-tier marquee alternatives.
